headline: Trump 🍊👑 Tells Cuba 'DEAL or NO OIL ⛽🚫 BEFORE TOO LATE!'
text:
Trump 🍊🦅, the ultimate LATAM BULLY 👊🌎, is YEETING 🔥 Venezuela's Maduro thug 🥷🇻🇪 after US RAID 💥🚁 on Caracas – now SLAMMING Cuba's commie bros 🥬🍌 to 'MAKE A DEAL 🤝💸 BEFORE IT'S TOO LATE ⏳💀!' No more 35K barrels of VENE-OIL ⛽🛢️ sloshing daily to Havana's THIRSTY ISLAND 🏝️😩 – Trump's tanking those sanctioned SUPERTANKERS 🚢🚫 like a boss, sparking Cuba's FUEL BLACKOUT 😵‍💫⚡ crisis hotter than Fidel's old cigars 🚬🔥!

Cuba's FM Bruno Rodriguez 🤨📢 SIMPING HARD 😤 for 'RIGHT TO FUEL FREELY 🆓⛽ WITHOUT YANKEE BULLYING 🇺🇸🚫!' while Prez Diaz-Canel 🧔🇨🇺 RAGES: 'NO ONE DICTATES OUR VIBES 😡✊!' But Trump on Truth Social 📱💥 DROPS BOMBSHELL 💣: 'Cuba LIVED on VENE-OIL & CASH 💰⛽ for YEARS, trading SECURITY GOONS 🛡️🥷 for Maduro & Cilia's thug life – BUT NOT ANYMORE ❌🚫!' ZERO OIL, ZERO MONEY to commie cucks 🐔🌴 – 'DEAL NOW or PERISH 😈⏰!'

Remember that EPIC CARACAS BUST 👮‍♂️💥? US snatched Maduro & wifey Cilia Flores 👩‍🍼🕵️‍♂️ on DRUG TRAFFICKING charges 📦💊 – Cuba's 32 BODYGUARDS 🛡️🇨🇺 got BODIED 😵⚰️ in the crossfire! Trump ROASTS: 'Those Cuban THUGS DEAD 💀, Venezuela's got USA's MILITARY DADDY 🦅💪 (WORLD'S #1 🔥) protecting now – no more EXTORTION RATS 🐀!'

Rubio 🧔🇨🇺, Cuban-American FLORIDA FIREBRAND 🔥👨‍💼 & SecState, WARNING Cuban commies: 'Y'ALL IN DEEP SHIT 😱🚽!' Trump REPOSTS 🤳 gem suggesting RUBIO FOR CUBA PREZ 👑🇨🇺 – 'SOUNDS GOOD TO ME 😎👍!' Donroe Doctrine 🦅🍊 reviving Monroe vibes – US SUPREMACY in LATAM 🌎👊, SMACKING lefty leaders like Colombia's Petro 🌿😤 ('WATCH YOUR ASS 🍑👀!') & Mexico's Sheinbaum 🇲🇽🚫 ('NO TROOPS HERE 🙅‍♀️!') for DRUG FLOODS 💊🌊 pouring north!

Cuba SIMPS 😩 deny ever getting PAID for goon squads 💰🛡️, but Trump ain't buying – reinstated TERROR SPONSOR label 🚨🇨🇺 right after Biden's soft era 🥺. Diaz-Canel CLAPS BACK: 'Y'ALL BUSINESS-MEN TURNING LIVES INTO CASH 💸😡 have ZERO MORAL HIGH GROUND!' But Trump's got that ORANGE MAGIC 🧡✨ – Cuba's economy CRUMBLING like Castro's beard 🧔💥, ready to FALL without VENE-LIFELINE ⛽🚫. Deal or DIE, Havana honeys 🏝️😍 – Donnie's LATAM CLEANUP is BRRRR-ing 😤🚀!
